## Summary

What changed, and why?

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Provider/API change
- [ ] Vault action or file-writing change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Release/maintenance

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] AI-suggested vault writes still require user review.
- [ ] Network, credential, telemetry, or file-writing changes are documented in README.md and SECURITY.md.
- [ ] Terminal setup commands, if changed, still run only in a visible user-triggered terminal.
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, private notes, generated local stores, or logs are committed.

## Tests

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run release:check`
- [ ] Manual Obsidian check, if UI behavior changed

## Notes For Reviewers

Mention anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
